posts.author: Parag_Joshi
posts.community: Mrs Bectors Food Specialities: Can it beat the industry?
posts.text: Very well priced post correction, may see a decent rise in foreseeable future. It can be potential safe growth story. Market cap can grow over 60k over the years steadily. Mrs Bectors is by far the smallest market cap here (₹5,600 Cr vs Britannia’s ₹1.28 lakh Cr) — smaller companies mathematically have more room to re-rate if execution continues. Its P/E (~40x) is the cheapest of the four, and notably cheaper than Bikaji (~65x) and Prataap (~127x), despite delivering comparable or better fundamentals than both. Revenue crossed ₹2,000 Cr in FY26 on a genuine 20% CAGR over four years (FY22→FY26)…
